releaseNotes: Elevates the App Store app preview video to a first-class growth lever (verified against Apple docs: up to 3 previews precede screenshots, the first autoplays muted as a ~5-second silent hook with a poster frame that must sell on its own). SCREENSHOTS.md now requires an App Preview Video (Autoplay Hook) section and an Asset Knowledge Brief so both screenshots and the preview are engineered from RESEARCH.md (user/problem), 11_STAR_EXPERIENCE.md (magical moment), and EMOTIONAL_DESIGN.md (Emotional North Star + Experience Card), and are always produced through the screenshot ASO skill (ParthJadhav/app-store-screenshots / ios-screenshots / app-preview-video). check-store-screenshots enforces this and it is auditable for existing apps; adds the app-preview-hook-missing-or-generic failure card and the app-preview-video-hook-missing LaunchBench eval.

Wires the Emotional Experience System into the downstream artifact templates: ANALYTICS.md (emotion-card event catalog + Dark-Pattern Watch), DESIGN.md (three-level tone + per-card motion/reduced-motion spec), TECH_SPEC.md (Experience Card frontstage/backstage + perceived-effort step-to-operation map), PRODUCTION_READINESS.md (per-card bright-line evidence rows), and ONBOARDING.md (card-timing contract).

Restructures EMOTIONAL_AUDIT.md per-journey tables from a 12-column block into a readable 8-column table plus a Findings & Pathway sub-block per journey, adds per-journey Emotional Curve markers for all 10 journeys, caps step scores at 7-star, corrects the lane key to lanes.emotional_design, and strengthens the acceptance gate to cover Critical and High journeys.

Adds the Emotional Experience System lane: an emotionally-intelligent consumer-product design layer grounded in behavioral science (Skinner, Schultz, Eyal, Fogg, Cialdini, Buell-Norton, Kahneman) with a 12-card Experience Card deck led by the four named cards — Commitment, Variable Reward, Perceived Effort Delay, and Intent Mirroring.

Ships a Producer path (charge a feature with engineered emotion → EMOTIONAL_DESIGN.md + emotional-design.html) and an Auditor path (walk every user journey on-device, score it through a six-lens review, and return a pathway to a better state → EMOTIONAL_AUDIT.md).

Adds the check:emotional-design validator enforcing the artifact contract plus a deterministic dark-pattern guardrail: high-risk cards (variable reward, streak, scarcity, urgency, social proof) require an ethics attestation, a user-control escape hatch, a counter-metric, and a mechanism-specific truthfulness proof; live copy is scanned for fake scarcity, fabricated social proof, confirmshaming, and commitment guilt.

Wires the lane into SKILL.md routing, launch-coverage, PROJECT_STATE.yaml (lanes.emotional_design), failure cards, and LaunchBench, and threads the cards through the 11-star 6/7-star levels, onboarding-conversion timing, and analytics-attribution events.
